TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: pkayal masu' pkayal yow na musa pisa btiyux sa'ing sali laga, htgan na sali nya ina ga tna'an maras y'aya ptna cpung na btiyux uy. pisa tnman na knerin hiya ga ba'un mita maha pisa kwara y'aya innaras ro pisa btiyux galun naha.cpngan pkayal naha musa pisa naras ina. krryax hiya ga musa utux patus repu, utux lukus kaga, y'aya pnmahan, y'aya na tpuyan, tnunan lukus mayung kaga, cpngan naha btiyux hiya ga gluw mlikuiy utux alang ga musa mluyak rgyax, ro musa mleh ro cabu 'cyux, lmon pnba' kwara bttiyux ro musa ms'un sa'ing mrkyas naha.
S.PHON: pkajal mas~…ēu Ē pkajal jow na mus~…ēa pis~…ēa ő≤tijux s~…ēa ĒiŇč s~…ēali la…£a, ńßt…£an na s~…ēali nja ina …£a tna Ēan maras~…ē j Ēaja ptna ¶~ ®puŇč na ő≤tijux uj. pis~…ēa tnman na knerin ńßija …£a ő≤a Ēun mita mańßa pis~…ēa kwara j Ēaja innaras~…ē ro pis~…ēa ő≤tijux …£alun nańßa. ¶~ ®pŇčan pkajal nańßa mus~…ēa pis~…ēa naras~…ē ina. krrjax ńßija …£a mus~…ēa utux patus~…ē repu, utux lukus~…ē ka…£a, j Ēaja pnmańßan, j Ēaja na tpujan, tnunan lukus~…ē majuŇč ka…£a, ¶~ ®pŇčan nańßa ő≤tijux ńßija …£a …£luw mlikuij utux alaŇč …£a mus~…ēa mlujak r…£jax, ro mus~…ēa mleńß ro ¶~ ®aő≤u Ē ¶~ ®jux, lmon pnő≤a Ē kwara ő≤ttijux ro mus~…ēa ms~…ē Ēun s~…ēa ĒiŇč mrkjas~…ē nańßa.
S.FORM: pkayal masu' pkayal yow na musa pisa btiyux sa'ing sali laga, htgan na sali nya ina ga tna'an maras y'aya ptna cpung na btiyux uy. pisa tnman na knerin hiya ga ba'un mita maha pisa kwara y'aya innaras ro pisa btiyux galun naha.cpngan pkayal naha musa pisa naras ina. krryax hiya ga musa utux patus repu, utux lukus kaga, y'aya pnmahan, y'aya na tpuyan, tnunan lukus mayung kaga, cpngan naha btiyux hiya ga gluw mlikuiy utux alang ga musa mluyak rgyax, ro musa mleh ro cabu 'cyux, lmon pnba' kwara bttiyux ro musa ms'un sa'ing mrkyas naha.
S.PHON: pkajal mas~…ēu Ē pkajal jow na mus~…ēa pis~…ēa ő≤tijux s~…ēa ĒiŇč s~…ēali la…£a, ńßt…£an na s~…ēali nja ina …£a tna Ēan maras~…ē j Ēaja ptna ¶~ ®puŇč na ő≤tijux uj. pis~…ēa tnman na knerin ńßija …£a ő≤a Ēun mita mańßa pis~…ēa kwara j Ēaja innaras~…ē ro pis~…ēa ő≤tijux …£alun nańßa. ¶~ ®pŇčan pkajal nańßa mus~…ēa pis~…ēa naras~…ē ina. krrjax ńßija …£a mus~…ēa utux patus~…ē repu, utux lukus~…ē ka…£a, j Ēaja pnmańßan, j Ēaja na tpujan, tnunan lukus~…ē majuŇč ka…£a, ¶~ ®pŇčan nańßa ő≤tijux ńßija …£a …£luw mlikuij utux alaŇč …£a mus~…ēa mlujak r…£jax, ro mus~…ēa mleńß ro ¶~ ®aő≤u Ē ¶~ ®jux, lmon pnő≤a Ē kwara ő≤ttijux ro mus~…ēa ms~…ē Ēun s~…ēa ĒiŇč mrkjas~…ē nańßa.
